summary: Research complete: PR4 (temporal metalogic core, 2,269 lines across 9 files) should be divided into 6 sub-PRs following the PR 1 gateway pattern. Sub-PR 4.1 is the gateway (~309 LOC: DerivationTree + DeductionTheorem), followed by Soundness (421), MCS (483), helpers bundle (494), WitnessSeed (252), and CompletenessHelpers (310).
